==={{aniseries|JN}}===
[[File:Ash and friends SM.png|thumb|250px|Lana and her classmates]]
In ''[[JN037|That New Old Gang of Mine!]]'', Lana saved [[Goh]] from drowning while fishing. She later participated in a welcome party for Ash and Goh and surprised everyone by reading a letter from Lillie. She also watched the battle between Goh and Kiawe.

In ''[[JN112|Helping the Hometown Hero!]]'', Lana attended a party to celebrate the return of Lillie and her family to Alola after they found Mohn, reuniting with Lillie, Ash, and Goh and meeting [[Chloe]]. Chloe asked Lana advice regarding what form her {{TP|Chloe|Eevee}} should evolve into, with Lana opening her eyes for the possibility of not evolving it at all. The next day, Lana watched a [[Battle Royal]] match between Ash, Kiawe, Gladion, and Professor Kukui.

In ''[[JN131|Paring Pokémon While Parrying!]]'' and ''[[JN132|Partners in Time!]]'', Lana was seen watching Ash's [[Masters Eight Tournament]] match against {{an|Leon}} at the [[Pokémon School]].

Lana reappeared in a fantasy in ''[[JN135|Heroes Unite!]]'', alongside the Trainers Chloe and her Eevee met.
{{-}}
